meta.name: Bharath Lakkoju
meta.title: Full Stack Developer & AI Engineer
meta.tagline: Building intelligent, scalable web applications that matter.
meta.availability: Open to SDE-1, SDE-2, Full Stack & AI Engineer roles
meta.bio: Full Stack Developer with 2+ years of experience architecting scalable web applications and integrating AI-driven predictive analytics. Passionate about building tools that solve real problems — from AI-powered resume evaluators to shared living management apps. Proficient in React, Next.js, Node.js, TypeScript, and Python.

bullets: Architected and deployed a full-stack health tracking application using React Native, Node.js, and PostgreSQL, implementing a reward system that increased user engagement by 60% and improved data intake by 98%.
Engineered a scalable Angular and Node.js microservices architecture with WCS data integration, deploying an automated digitization banner that reduced manual processing overhead by 75%.
Developed and integrated an AI-powered chatbot leveraging predictive analytics and LLM APIs, boosting monthly active users by 40% and enhancing real-time customer support capabilities.
Led the migration of legacy Java Spring services to Node.js and NestJS microservices, establishing API security standards and improving system maintainability by 35%.
Collaborated with cross-functional teams in Agile sprints, conducting rigorous code reviews and optimizing CI/CD pipelines to achieve 99% deployment uptime.
Developed a full-stack SaaS platform for AI-powered software testing tools for QA engineers and development teams.
Built 5 AI testing tools: IdeaForge, AutoScribe, CucumberCraft, DomDetective, and WebTrekker.
Implemented credit-based billing with Razorpay payment integration and a full auth system with email/password and OAuth.
Designed a complete SaaS shell with marketing site, per-product landing pages, pricing page, and multi-currency pricing support.

projects.name: ATS Precision
projects.shortDesc: AI-powered ATS resume evaluator with weighted scoring
projects.description: A deterministic ATS resume evaluator that scores a resume against a specific job description using a weighted algorithm across keyword match, skills alignment, section completeness, and formatting quality.
highlights: Engineered deterministic ATS scoring with weighted breakdown across keyword, skills, structure, and formatting
Built keyword gap analysis highlighting missing critical terms and overused filler phrases
Implemented server-side PDF and DOCX resume parsing
Delivered section-by-section feedback with role-specific improvement suggestions ranked by impact
Enabled PDF evaluation report download via jsPDF + html2canvas

projects.name: Flatmate
projects.shortDesc: Full-stack shared living management app with AI suggestions
projects.description: A collaborative household management app with expense tracking, grocery lists, meal planning with OCR receipt scanning, task management, and Google Gemini AI-powered household suggestions.
highlights: Full auth with email + OAuth via Supabase
Expense tracker for splitting and logging household costs
OCR-powered receipt scanning (Tesseract.js) for automatic meal logging
Google Gemini AI for intelligent household suggestions
End-to-end testing with Playwright

projects.name: Waigenie.tech
projects.shortDesc: SaaS platform for AI-powered software testing toolkit
projects.description: A production SaaS platform with 5 AI-powered testing tools for QA engineers, credit-based billing, and a full authentication system.
highlights: 5 AI testing tools: IdeaForge, AutoScribe, CucumberCraft, DomDetective, WebTrekker
Credit-based billing with Razorpay payment integration
Full auth system with email/password, Google OAuth, GitHub OAuth, and password reset
Multi-currency pricing support
Complete SaaS marketing site with per-product landing pages

projects.name: SwiftMedia
projects.description: A privacy-first, browser-based media processing suite with zero server uploads. Supports image compression, video compression via FFmpeg/WebAssembly, PDF compression, and PDF merging.
highlights: Client-side image compression for JPEG, PNG, WebP — 65% size reduction
FFmpeg compiled to WebAssembly for in-browser video compression — 70% size reduction
PDF compression and merger running entirely client-side
Zero file uploads — full privacy guarantee

projects.name: SalaryWise
projects.shortDesc: Salary benchmarks across roles, companies, and Indian cities
projects.description: A web application for job seekers to explore and compare salary benchmarks across roles, companies, and Indian cities, with an SEO-optimized blog.
highlights: SEO-optimized blog with editorial salary insights — 45% organic traffic increase
Sitemap and robots.txt configuration — 50% improvement in crawlability
Google AdSense monetization integration
Fast, minimal UI focused on readability

projects.name: FaviConverter
projects.shortDesc: Browser-native favicon toolkit with live preview
projects.description: A browser-native favicon toolkit that converts images to favicons entirely client-side with zero file uploads.
highlights: Image-to-favicon converter supporting PNG/JPG/SVG to .ico — 80% faster
SVG-to-favicon and SVG-to-ICO converters
Live preview of generated favicons
Auto-generates .zip bundle with all required sizes (16×16 to 180×180)

achievements: Deployed 8+ full-stack web and mobile applications serving 100+ active users with 75% uptime
Increased user engagement by 60% through innovative reward system implementation
Reduced operational costs by 75% through automated digitization banner component
Led frontend team of interns, mentoring on best practices and ensuring project delivery
Achieved 95% accuracy in AI-powered insurance recommendation system
